answers.1: I was impressed—slick interface and the voice input worked perfectly on my phone.

answers.3: Completely trust it—it’s pulling live data, so no outdated info.
answers.4: The voice input/output is brilliant—I can ask while cooking dinner.
answers.5: Nothing really frustrated me, but the colour scheme could be a bit more modern.
answers.6: Integration with my Apple Health or cat’s microchip records would be cool.

answers.9: I love it—I opted in straight away, so it remembers my cat’s name and last visit.
answers.10: Absolutely—I avoid phone calls like the plague.
answers.11: Telehealth video call option for minor concerns.

answers.5: It asked for my consent to remember me before I even finished my first query—felt pushy.

answers.8: The weather advice is great—I can check if it’s safe to walk my flat-faced dog in summer.
answers.9: I declined—don’t want my info stored, thanks.
answers.10: Maybe—if it can save me money, yes, but I still prefer talking to a human for my first visit.
answers.11: A price comparison tool showing different vet clinics’ costs.

answers.1: Loved it—clean, modern, and the puppy picture made me smile.
answers.2: Very easy—I searched “puppy vaccination schedule” and it showed everything in order.
answers.3: Absolutely—I even checked with the clinic and the prices matched exactly.
answers.4: The booking calendar was seamless—I could see all available slots at a glance.
answers.5: It didn’t have a “new puppy owner” guide—I had to piece things together.
answers.6: A checklist of first-year vaccinations and when to book them.
answers.7: Perfect—booked a full puppy package in two minutes.
answers.8: The walking-weather feature is great—I check it before taking my Golden out in the rain.
answers.9: I love it—it remembers my puppy’s name and breed, so I don’t repeat myself.
answers.10: Yes, 100%—it’s faster and I can do it while watching TV.
answers.11: A photo upload for my puppy’s progress—cute and useful.

2. Very easy—I searched “puppy vaccination schedule” and it showed everything in order.  
3. Absolutely—I even checked with the clinic and the prices matched exactly.  
4. The booking calendar was seamless—I could see all available slots at a glance.  
5. It didn’t have a “new puppy owner” guide—I had to piece things together.  
6. A checklist of first-year vaccinations and when to book them.  
7. Perfect—booked a full puppy package in two minutes.  
8. The walking-weather feature is great—I check it before taking my Golden out in the rain.  
9. I love it—it remembers my puppy’s name and breed, so I don’t repeat myself.  
10. Yes, 100%—it’s faster and I can do it while watching TV.  
11. A photo upload for my puppy’s progress—cute and useful.

answers.6: A “multi-small-pet” booking for combined checkups.
answers.7: Fine—took a bit of time doing two bookings, but got it done.
answers.8: Not useful for small pets, but the holiday hours help with school holidays.
answers.9: I opted in—it saves me typing the pets’ names each time.
answers.10: Yes—I can do it during my lunch break without calling.
answers.11: A “school holiday” alert for available slots.
